creator: h.eichmann@gmx.de
text:
Hi!

Due to the lack of free time I have to drop the maintainership of my ports.

steak itself seems to be dead: There was no activity since 2002.

Best regards,


Heiner

Fix: --Boundary-00=_4ECBMQg+SuuoIc5

--- Makefile.orig	2010-05-31 22:47:39.000000000 +0200
+++ Makefile	2010-05-31 22:48:04.000000000 +0200
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@
 
 DISTNAME=	Steak.${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	h.eichmann@gmx.de
+MAINTAINER=	ports@freebsd.org
 COMMENT=	An english <-> german dictionary under the GPL
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	ispell:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/ispell
